notes:
Release surface hygiene cleanup + per-family reasoning contracts.

Production-eligible (live-proven):
- ZAYA1-8B + ZAYA1-VL-8B: JANGTQ4 + MXFP4 (text + VL) with typed zaya_cca_v1 cache (paged + block-L2 disk-restore proven)
- Qwen3.6-35B MoE: text + image + video, paged+ssm+disk
- Ling JANGTQ: hybrid SSM (28 GLA + 4 MLA), /v1/responses multi-turn cache reuse (non-reasoning model — Thinking UI disabled across engine + panel)
- Hy3 JANGTQ2: 80 TurboQuantKVCache layers, Low/High reasoning effort picker, Hunyuan tools + qwen3 reasoning parser (NOT Harmony)
- MiniMax JANGTQ: 43+ visible tok/s with SIMD-shuffle Hadamard kernel fix (trained K=8, no top-k override required)

Reasoning UI corrections:
- Hy3 effort dispatch: Low/High only (Medium hidden, stale Medium warns)
- Ling: NOT a reasoning model (engine clamps + panel hides Thinking buttons)
- Cross-family stale-effort warning if user switches model
- Per-family effort levels canonicalized in engine: deepseek_v4 [low,medium,high,max] / hy_v3 [low,high] / openai_gptoss [low,medium,high] / mistral [low,medium,high] / others binary

ZAYA JANGTQ2 removed: 2-bit codebook quality ceiling fundamentally lossier than JANGTQ4 (rel_l2 0.343 vs 0.099 on routed experts). JANGTQ4 is the quality-safe ZAYA quant.

Performance note: ZAYA MXFP4 at default sampling (temp=0.7, top_p=0.9) ~50 tok/s; greedy (temp=0) ~73 tok/s. Cache and batching fully active; gap is sampling overhead, not a regression.

Source hygiene: production code free of hardcoded user paths and private-doc references.
